name: classify_fallback_reason

name: recover_json_object
docstring: Recover a JSON object from model output.

name: main
docstring: Voxera CLI root command group.

name: version_cmd
docstring: Show Voxera version.

name: secrets_set
docstring: Store a secret via keyring (with secure file fallback).

name: secrets_get
docstring: Read secret metadata safely (raw value hidden by default).

name: secrets_unset
docstring: Remove a stored secret from keyring/file fallback.

name: config_show
docstring: Show resolved runtime config (redacted).

name: config_validate
docstring: Validate runtime config and exit non-zero on errors.

name: setup

docstring: Run a safe 5-minute guided demo checklist.

name: status
docstring: Show current configuration summary.

name: run

name: missions_plan

docstring: Run a built-in multi-step mission by ID.

name: panel

name: daemon

name: ops_bundle_system

name: ops_bundle_job
docstring: Export a per-job ops bundle.

docstring: Detect typo-like near-submit phrases that do NOT match any canonical

name: test_prune_dry_run_default_no_deletion
docstring: Default (no --yes) must never delete anything.

name: test_prune_max_age_days_selects_old
docstring: --max-age-days 1 should report 2 candidates (old_file, old_dir).

name: test_prune_max_count_keeps_newest
docstring: --max-count 2 with 4 entries keeps 2 newest, reports 2 would-prune.

name: test_prune_yes_deletes_and_reports_bytes
docstring: --yes --max-age-days 1 should delete old entries and report reclaimed_bytes > 0.

name: test_prune_missing_artifacts_dir_exits_zero
docstring: If artifacts/ does not exist, command exits 0 with helpful message.

name: test_prune_no_rules_configured_exits_zero
docstring: No flags and no config should exit 0 with 'no pruning rules' message.

name: test_prune_json_output
docstring: --json flag emits parseable JSON with expected keys.

name: test_prune_yes_deletes_symlink_with_outside_target
docstring: Symlink inside artifacts/ pointing to outside target must be unlinked, not skipped.

name: _make_job
docstring: Create a job file in bucket_dir with an optional explicit mtime.

name: _make_sidecar
docstring: Create a sidecar file (e.g. job-XYZ.error.json) in bucket_dir.

name: _queue_dir
docstring: Return a fresh queue root under tmp_path.

name: test_no_rules_configured_exits_zero
docstring: When neither --max-age-days nor --max-count is given, exit 0 with message.

name: test_dry_run_does_not_delete
docstring: Default (no --yes) must never delete anything.

name: test_age_based_prune_selects_old_only
docstring: --max-age-days 1 selects only jobs older than 1 day; new jobs are kept.

name: test_count_based_prune_per_bucket
docstring: --max-count 1 keeps the single newest per bucket; older ones selected.

name: test_yes_deletes_jobs_and_sidecars
docstring: --yes deletes selected job files and matching sidecars in the same bucket.

name: test_missing_buckets_handled_gracefully
docstring: If terminal bucket directories do not exist, command exits 0 without crash.

name: test_json_output_structure
docstring: --json emits parseable JSON with all required keys.

name: test_inbox_and_pending_not_touched
docstring: queue prune must never touch inbox/ or pending/ directories.

name: test_sidecars_not_counted_as_primary_candidates
docstring: job-b.error.json / job-b.state.json must NOT inflate candidate counts.

name: _make_job
docstring: Create a minimal primary job file.

name: _make_sidecar
docstring: Create a sidecar file (e.g. job-XYZ.error.json).

name: _make_approval
docstring: Create an approval file in pending/approvals/.

name: _make_artifact_dir
docstring: Create a directory under artifacts/.

name: _run_reconcile
docstring: Invoke `voxera queue reconcile --json --queue-dir <path>` and parse output.

name: test_empty_queue_no_issues
docstring: An empty (or entirely missing) queue directory reports zero issues.

name: test_orphan_sidecar_detected
docstring: Sidecar in terminal bucket without primary job is reported as orphan.

name: test_sidecar_with_primary_not_orphan
docstring: Sidecar paired with its primary job is NOT reported as an orphan.

name: test_orphan_approval_detected
docstring: Approval file with no corresponding pending job is reported.

name: test_approval_with_pending_job_not_orphan
docstring: Approval file paired with a pending job is NOT reported as an orphan.

name: test_duplicate_job_detected
docstring: Same job filename in done/ and failed/ is reported as a duplicate.

name: test_unique_job_per_bucket_not_duplicate
docstring: Different job files across buckets are not reported as duplicates.

name: test_orphan_artifact_candidate_detected
docstring: Artifact entry with no matching job file anywhere is reported as a candidate.

name: test_artifact_with_existing_job_not_orphan
docstring: Artifact entry with a matching job file in any bucket is NOT reported.

name: test_human_output_report_only_note
docstring: Human output always contains the report-only disclaimer.

name: test_json_schema_fields_present
docstring: JSON output always contains the required top-level schema fields.

name: test_multiple_issues_combined
docstring: All four issue types can be detected in a single scan.

name: test_examples_are_sorted
docstring: Example paths must be in stable sorted order regardless of filesystem order.

name: test_missing_directories_no_error
docstring: Completely empty tmp_path (no subdirs at all) exits 0 with 0 issues.

name: _run_reconcile_fix
docstring: Invoke `voxera queue reconcile --fix [--yes] [--quarantine-dir D] --json --queue-dir P`.

name: test_fix_preview_does_not_change_filesystem
docstring: --fix without --yes must not move any files (pure preview).

name: test_fix_preview_human_output_indicates_preview
docstring: Human output for --fix (no --yes) contains 'preview' or 'dry-run'.

name: test_fix_yes_quarantines_orphan_sidecar_and_approval
docstring: --fix --yes moves orphan sidecar + orphan approval; originals are gone.

name: test_fix_yes_does_not_quarantine_artifact_candidates
docstring: Artifact candidates are never moved in fix mode (report-only category).

name: test_fix_yes_does_not_quarantine_duplicates
docstring: Duplicate job files are never moved in fix mode (report-only category).

name: test_fix_yes_paired_sidecar_not_quarantined
docstring: A sidecar paired with its primary job must NOT be quarantined.

name: test_quarantine_dir_default_under_queue_dir
docstring: Default quarantine directory is created inside queue_dir with correct prefix.

name: test_quarantine_dir_custom_within_queue_dir
docstring: A custom --quarantine-dir within queue_dir is accepted.

name: test_quarantine_dir_outside_queue_dir_rejected
docstring: A --quarantine-dir outside queue_dir must be rejected with exit code 1.

name: test_json_fix_preview_schema
docstring: JSON output in fix_preview mode has mode, quarantine_dir, and fix_counts.

name: test_json_fix_applied_schema
docstring: JSON output in fix_applied mode has correct mode and quarantined paths.

name: test_json_report_mode_fix_counts_are_zero
docstring: JSON output in report-only mode always has zeroed fix_counts.

name: test_fix_yes_quarantines_symlink_orphan_without_following_target
docstring: --fix --yes quarantines a symlink orphan without touching its target.

name: test_service_status_user_scope_preferred_when_active
docstring: When user scope shows active but system scope shows inactive, user scope wins.

name: test_service_status_system_failed_preferred_over_user_inactive
docstring: When system scope reports failed and user scope is inactive, system scope is primary.

name: test_service_status_timeout_error_class
docstring: When both systemctl scopes time out, error_class is timeout, not missing_dependency.

name: test_service_status_query_failed_error_class
docstring: When both systemctl scopes fail with CalledProcessError, error_class is service_query_failed.

name: test_service_status_missing_dependency_only_for_file_not_found
docstring: missing_dependency error_class only when systemctl binary is truly absent.

name: test_service_status_scope_warning_when_one_scope_fails
docstring: When system scope times out but user scope succeeds, scope_warning is surfaced.

name: test_recent_service_logs_scope_warning_when_system_fails
docstring: When system scope fails but user scope has content, scope_warning is surfaced.

name: test_recent_service_logs_empty_user_warns_about_failed_system
docstring: When user scope returns empty and system scope times out, scope_warning is present.

name: test_recent_service_logs_timeout_error_class
docstring: When both journalctl scopes time out, error_class is timeout, not missing_dependency.

name: test_recent_service_logs_query_failed_error_class

docstring: Unfenced JSON payload (no ``` fencing) must be stripped from

name: test_checklist_with_bare_goal_json_stripped
docstring: Bare JSON with 'goal' key must be stripped.

name: test_checklist_with_multiline_unfenced_json_stripped
docstring: Multi-line unfenced JSON block must be stripped.

name: test_broader_meta_commentary_stripped
docstring: Broader meta-commentary phrasings must be stripped when list items

name: test_deterministic_final_render_10_runs
docstring: 10 runs with maximally adversarial LLM outputs — must ALWAYS produce

name: test_sanitizer_empty_fallback_does_not_restore_banned_content
docstring: When the LLM produces ONLY preview/workflow language with no list items,

name: test_sanitizer_empty_fallback_extracts_items_from_mixed_output
docstring: When the sanitizer empties non-list lines, items must survive.

name: test_grocery_checklist_with_preview_language_deterministic
docstring: Grocery checklist with preview language — matches Failure B from issue.

name: test_two_turn_planning_with_json_payload_stripped
docstring: Two-turn flow where follow-up produces JSON — matches Failure C.

name: test_wedding_checklist_repeated_5_runs_deterministic
docstring: Exact wedding checklist prompt from issue — 5 runs, must be 100% clean.

name: test_enforcement_layer_catches_sanitizer_edge_case
docstring: If the sanitizer somehow misses a violation, the enforcement layer

name: test_enforcement_layer_handles_empty_text
docstring: Enforcement layer must extract items from raw_answer when text is empty.

name: test_blocked_queue_path_returns_clean_refusal_no_preview
docstring: Queue control-plane paths via shorthand must fail closed with a clear refusal.

name: test_review_missing_job_followups_stay_evidence_aware
docstring: Explicit job ID in message → review branch fires and fails closed.

name: test_json_config_request_creates_preview_and_shows_fenced_code
docstring: JSON config draft requests now produce a governed preview AND show fenced code.

name: test_enrichment_stored_for_info_query_with_active_preview
docstring: Informational web query with an active preview stores enrichment in session.

name: test_enrichment_backed_put_that_into_file_updates_preview_content
docstring: 'put that into the file' after an enrichment turn resolves the summary into preview content.

name: test_standalone_info_query_does_not_store_enrichment
docstring: Informational query with NO active preview skips enrichment (standalone web turn).

name: test_put_that_into_file_without_enrichment_no_active_preview_fails_closed
docstring: 'put that into the file' with no preview and no enrichment must not create a phantom preview.

name: test_job_review_query_fails_closed_without_job_context
docstring: Review hint on a fresh session (no job context) fails closed honestly.

name: test_what_was_the_output_surfaces_actual_written_content
docstring: End-to-end regression: 'What was the output?' for a completed file-write

name: test_job_review_query_status_of_my_job_falls_through_without_context
docstring: 'status of my job' on a fresh session → falls through to LLM.

name: test_job_review_query_status_of_last_job_fails_closed_without_context
docstring: 'what is the status of the last job' on a fresh session → fails closed honestly.

name: test_python_script_request_creates_authoritative_preview
docstring: Python script request → real write_file preview with LLM-generated code.

name: test_bash_script_request_creates_authoritative_preview
docstring: Bash script request → real write_file preview with LLM-generated code.

name: test_yaml_config_request_creates_authoritative_preview
docstring: YAML config request → real write_file preview.

name: test_json_config_request_creates_authoritative_preview
docstring: JSON config request → real write_file preview.

name: test_code_is_rendered_in_proper_fenced_code_block_in_reply
docstring: Code draft reply is shown to the user with fenced code blocks, not suppressed.

name: test_code_reply_not_suppressed_by_voxera_preview_flow_logic
docstring: Code draft replies are not replaced by the generic 'Understood' message.

name: test_follow_up_save_it_submits_code_draft_preview
docstring: 'save it' after a code draft creates a governed handoff because preview exists.

name: test_follow_up_save_this_submits_code_draft_preview
docstring: 'save this' after a code draft submits because preview exists.

name: test_code_draft_preview_has_real_content_not_empty_placeholder
docstring: The preview content must be the actual LLM-generated code, not the empty placeholder.

name: test_no_pseudo_preview_json_in_user_facing_chat_output
docstring: Internal write_file JSON must NOT leak raw into the user-facing answer.

name: test_code_draft_when_llm_reply_has_no_code_fence_no_exception
docstring: When the LLM reply has no fenced code, no exception is raised.

name: test_existing_write_file_flows_still_work
docstring: Regression: existing explicit write_file flows must not be broken.

name: test_code_draft_explicit_filename_is_used
docstring: When the user provides an explicit filename, it is used in the preview path.

name: test_code_draft_does_not_enqueue_without_explicit_submit
docstring: Creating a code draft preview must not enqueue a job automatically.

name: test_code_draft_refinement_updates_preview_and_shows_reply
docstring: Refining a code draft updates the preview content and shows the updated code.

name: test_code_draft_refinement_then_save_it_submits
docstring: Full flow: draft → refine → save it → job enqueued.

name: test_lets_save_it_with_apostrophe_submits
docstring: "let's save it" (with apostrophe) correctly submits when a preview exists.

name: test_write_that_to_a_file_submits_when_preview_exists
docstring: "write that to a file" submits when a preview exists.

name: test_no_false_preview_claim_when_llm_has_no_fenced_code
docstring: When the LLM mentions 'preview' but produces no fenced code, no preview exists.

name: test_no_false_preview_claim_when_builder_creates_empty_preview
docstring: When the builder creates a preview with empty content, false preview claims are stripped.

name: test_submit_with_no_preview_fails_truthfully
docstring: 'submit it' / 'go ahead' without a real preview fails clearly.

name: test_go_ahead_with_no_preview_fails_truthfully
docstring: 'go ahead' without preview fails clearly.

name: test_submit_with_real_code_preview_succeeds
docstring: 'submit it' with a real code draft preview triggers actual queue handoff.

name: test_code_in_chat_without_preview_does_not_claim_preview_exists
docstring: Code shown in chat alone must not claim a preview exists.

name: test_false_preview_claim_stripped_preserves_code_blocks
docstring: When a false preview claim is stripped, fenced code blocks are preserved.

name: test_existing_explicit_write_file_flow_not_regressed
docstring: Explicit write_file preview flows must still work.

name: test_explicit_filename_code_draft_populates_preview_content
docstring: 'Create a Python script called scraper.py ...' must populate real code content.

name: test_failed_code_draft_clears_empty_preview_shell
docstring: When LLM makes false preview claim but produces no code, empty shell is cleared.

name: test_code_draft_placeholder_survives_when_llm_makes_no_preview_claim
docstring: Placeholder preview survives when the LLM does not claim a preview exists.

name: test_code_draft_with_trailing_space_on_fence_line_extracts_code
docstring: Code extraction must succeed even when LLM adds trailing space after language tag.

name: test_code_draft_hint_injected_into_user_message_for_code_draft
docstring: code_draft=True must be passed to generate_vera_reply for code-draft requests.

name: test_code_draft_hint_not_injected_for_non_code_draft
docstring: code_draft must be False for non-code-draft requests.

name: test_real_world_python_url_fetch_script_creates_preview
docstring: 'I need you to code a python script that fetches a URL and prints the page title.'

name: test_real_world_scrape_any_website_creates_preview
docstring: 'write me a python script that will scrape any website'

name: test_real_world_bash_disk_memory_creates_preview_and_submit_works
docstring: 'Write me a bash script that prints disk usage and memory usage.'

name: test_build_vera_messages_includes_code_draft_hint_when_flag_set
docstring: build_vera_messages must append code-generation hint when code_draft=True.

name: test_build_vera_messages_no_hint_when_flag_not_set
docstring: build_vera_messages must NOT add the code-draft hint for normal requests.

name: test_build_vera_messages_includes_writing_draft_hint_when_flag_set
docstring: build_vera_messages must append prose-draft hint when writing_draft=True.

name: test_build_vera_messages_rejects_conflicting_draft_hints
docstring: build_vera_messages must fail closed if both draft hint types are requested.
